positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a soaring celestial fox (kitsune) spirit, rendered in a Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print style, highly detailed and stylized. The fox should have flowing, ethereal tails and dynamic energy lines suggesting movement. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, featuring bold black outlines and limited palette accents of gold foil and deep indigo. Integrate subtle background elements like stylized clouds and crescent moons to create a medallion-like printable design. Clean silhouettes, high contrast, suitable for screen printing on apparel, vector quality.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, noise, artifact, blurry, low detail, watermark, text, signature, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, cropped, logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters, color gradient, gradient lines
